case_title: DUNN, FRED J. VS CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO ATTN: BOB LONG et al

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION NOV-12-2003, AUTOMATIC CONTINUANCE PER REQUEST TO NOV-14-2003 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506 CLAIMANT HAS FOUR(4) CLAIMS AND SHOULD BE CONSOLIDATED.
DEFT'S REQUEST FOR AN ORDERED CONTINUANCE ON 1/28/ 04 (WED) AT 1:30PM (CAL:20-0);EXEMPT;TO FOLDER FOR THE COMM'S DETERMINATION.
NOTICE OF TIME & PLACE OF HEARING SENT TO NANCY PADILLA RETURNED--NOT AT PRESIDIO ADDRESS
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION NOV-12-2003, CONTINUANCE ORDERED PER REQUEST TO DEC-01-2003 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION NOV-14-2003, CONTINUED BY COURT TO NOV-12-2003 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506 ORDER GRANTED.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF DUNN, FRED J. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO  ATTN: BOB LONG PADILLA, NANCY (#0793) $1,500.00 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,500.00, DEFENDANT PADILLA WAS NOT PROPERLY INFORMED BY HER EMPLOYER ON THE RULES FOR TRANSPORT OF SIGNAL DOGS, AS SHOWN IN THE 4-6-01 MUNI BULLETIN #01-034. DEFENDANT PADILLA HAS NO PERSONAL LIABILITY FOR THIS INCIDENT. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
PLTFF'S REQUEST FOR AN ORDER TO "ADVANCE" HEARING DATE TO 11/12/03(WED)AT 1:30 PM (CAL:20-10);IFP;TO FOLDER FOR THE COMM'S DETERMINATION.
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION DEC-01-2003, CONTINUED BY COURT TO JAN-28-2004 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506 ORDER GRANTED.

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,500.00 FILED BY DUNN, FRED J. AS TO DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO  ATTN: BOB LONG PADILLA, NANCY (#0793) ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-12-2003 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE OF HEARING TO NANCY PADILLA, SF MUNICIPAL RAILWAY, RETURNED REFUSED.
PLTF REQUEST FOR CONTINUANCE FILED. FEE WAIVED. TO BE SIGNED BY COMM.
